rag_rules: Fix AGREE diagnostics by resolving visible identifiers or removing invalid clauses
Avoid introducing package-qualified references not present in the model
generic_rules: Ensure type consistency between assumptions, guarantees, and declared helpers
Validate that all referenced identifiers are visible in the current scope
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be placed in valid annex scopes (type vs implementation)
Use only visible AADL features or declared helpers in expressions
anti_patterns: Do not add architecture or references outside the current model's scope
Do not convert Boolean domain values into integers in range comparisons
irrelevant_topics: AADL Inspector diagnostics about property associations
